channel.title: [Archive] The Edge Nights Catchup Podcast
channel.itunes:subtitle: All the best bits every week with podcast exclusive content and some extra fun stuff when it comes up. [archive]
channel.description: Hear all the best bits from Edge nights host and resident DJ Sean Hill every week, with podcast exclusive content and full length interviews with the biggest celebs! Listen live 7pm-midnight, weeknights on The Edge. [archive]
channel.itunes:summary: Hear all the best bits from Edge nights host and resident DJ Sean Hill every week, with podcast exclusive content and full length interviews with the biggest celebs! Listen live 7pm-midnight, weeknights on The Edge. [archive]
channel.itunes:author: rova | The Edge

item.title: SYCCO Joins the show!
item.itunes:title: SYCCO Joins the show!
item.description:
Hot off her collab with FLUME and performance at Electric ave, Aussie artis Sycco Joins me

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
Hot off her collab with FLUME and performance at Electric ave, Aussie artis Sycco Joins me

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Flume Joins The Show
item.itunes:title: Flume Joins The Show
item.description:
Aussie DJ/Producer Flume joins me to try aussie/kiwi snacks, chat Music and some fast facts.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Sean Hill Live In The Mix
item.itunes:title: Sean Hill Live In The Mix
item.description:
A replay of my Friday Morning Mix on the Edge Brekkie, Enjoy x

item.content:encoded:

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: rova | The Edge

item.title: Sean Hill live in the Mix (Rihanna Special)
item.itunes:title: Sean Hill live in the Mix (Rihanna Special)
item.description:
This week i recreated Rihanna's Superbowl Halftime set, the same tracks, in the same order, with my own flare. enjoy x

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
This week i recreated Rihanna's Superbowl Halftime set, the same tracks, in the same order, with my own flare. enjoy x

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: The Worst Idea Of All Time
item.itunes:title: The Worst Idea Of All Time
item.description:
Comedian's Tim Batt and Guy Montgomery join me to discuss what its like watching the same terrible movie 52 times...

item.title: Hailee Steinfeld Joins The Show...
item.itunes:title: Hailee Steinfeld Joins The Show...
item.description:
Caught up with Hailee Steinfeld about her new track 'Coast', Reworking old songs in 2022 and juggling actress and popstar life.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Urzila Carlson Joins The Show...

item.title: Daily Music News Feed // 5.02
item.itunes:title: Daily Music News Feed // 5.02
item.description:
Jared Leto tells a story about a young Billie Eilish ans Finneas performing for him and Leo DiCaprio at a private house party, annnd Sabrina Carpenter spills the beans on whether 'Skin' is actually about Olivia Rodrigo!
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
Jared Leto tells a story about a young Billie Eilish ans Finneas performing for him and Leo DiCaprio at a private house party, annnd Sabrina Carpenter spills the beans on whether 'Skin' is actually about Olivia Rodrigo!
